epic.title: Digital Leave Approval Workflow
epic.description:
Replace the current email/Excel leave approval process with a configurable, auditable digital workflow that enforces real-time balance checks and routes approvals by role.

**Business value:** Eliminates manual errors and untracked approvals, gives HR a full audit trail, and lets the client roll out a consistent, client-specific approval circuit starting with a pilot before scaling to other clients.

**In scope:**
- Leave request lifecycle: submission, manager/HR approval, rejection, cancellation
- Balance/quota validation before approval
- Configurable multi-level approval circuit per client
- Delegation layer and auto-escalation after 5 business days
- HR-validated cancellation, including already-started leave
- Email and in-app notifications on key events
- One-way calendar sync (system to calendar)
- Role-based permissions with HR as sole editor of approved requests
- Multi-tenant configuration isolation for pilot-then-scale rollout

**Out of scope:**
- Payroll integration
- Two-way calendar sync
- Migration of historical leave requests / past audit data
- Reporting dashboards and exports
- Country templates beyond France at this stage

issues.title: Spike: define concurrency and race-safety model for balance checks and escalation timing
issues.description: Investigate how to safely handle overlapping leave requests, simultaneous balance deductions, and an approver/delegate racing the escalation timer. Output a locking/versioning approach to guide implementation.

issues.title: Extend Leave/Absence data model for approval workflow
issues.description: Add approval status, approver chain, balance reference, delegation, escalation state, and calendar reference fields to the existing Leave/Absence entity.

issues.title: Build configurable approval circuit engine
issues.description: Implement a per-client configurable circuit (manager, then HR above a threshold) so rules can vary by client, country and contract without code changes.

issues.title: Implement balance/quota validation with concurrency-safe checks
issues.description: Validate balance/quota before approval using the locking approach from the concurrency spike; revalidate at final approval to handle overlapping requests.

issues.title: Implement leave request state machine
issues.description: Build the submitted -> manager -> optional HR -> approved/rejected workflow, wired to the approval circuit engine and balance validation.

issues.title: Add auto-escalation after 5 business days
issues.description: Trigger automatic escalation to the next approver level if no action is taken within 5 business days, respecting the concurrency-safe timer design.

issues.title: Build delegation layer over existing permissions
issues.description: Allow an approver to delegate their approval authority; delegation must overlay existing role permissions without replacing them.

issues.title: Implement HR-validated cancellation flow
issues.description: Build a separate cancellation workflow requiring HR validation, including cancellation of leave that has already started.

issues.title: Configure notifications for key workflow events
issues.description: Send email and in-app notifications on submission, approval, rejection, escalation and cancellation, routed to the correct role/contact per event.

issues.title: Build one-way calendar sync integration
issues.description: Push approved leave to the external calendar system; no reverse sync is required at this stage.

issues.title: Implement role-based permissions for leave workflow
issues.description: Enforce Employee/Manager/HR/Admin permissions, with HR as the sole editor of approved requests and validator of cancellations, layered with the delegation model.

issues.title: Build employee and manager request/approval UI
issues.description: Provide screens for employees to submit requests and for managers/HR to review, approve, reject or escalate, reflecting current workflow state and permissions.

issues.title: Build HR admin console for circuit and entitlement configuration
issues.description: Let HR/admins configure the approval circuit and entitlement templates per client, without engineering involvement.

issues.title: Configure multi-tenant isolation for pilot rollout
issues.description: Ensure per-client configuration (circuits, entitlement templates, notification routing) is isolated so the pilot client's setup does not affect others during scale-out.

issues.title: Add audit trail for requests and entitlement rule changes
issues.description: Log all state transitions on leave requests plus any changes to entitlement rule templates, so approvals and configuration changes are both traceable.

issues.title: QA: acceptance suite for approval, escalation, cancellation and concurrency scenarios
issues.description: Cover approve/reject across the full circuit, auto-escalation timing, HR-validated cancellation of started leave, and race conditions between approvers/delegates and the escalation timer.

open_questions: What is the target delivery timeline for the pilot, and which client goes first?
Do reporting/export needs stay fully out of scope for this phase, or is a minimal audit view expected at pilot launch?
Should historical leave requests be backfilled for continuity of the audit trail, even in summary form?
